title: Notification No.35/2002-CE (N.T)
text: 24th October, 2002 Notification No. 35/2002-Central Excise (N.T) In pursuance of paragraph 2 of the notification of the Government of India, in the erstwhile Ministry of Finance, (Department of Revenue), No.14/2002-Central Excise (N.T.) dated the 8 th March, 2002 and in supersession of notification No. 34/2002- Central Excise (N.T.) dated the 1 st October, 2002, [ G.S.R. (E) dated the 1 st October, 2002], the Central Board of Excise and Customs notifies that notification No.14 / 2002-Central Excise (N.T.) dated the 8 th March, 2002 shall come into effect on and from the 1 st day of November, 2002. M. G. Thamizh Valavan Under Secretary to the Government of India F.No.208/38/2001-CX.6 Note: The Principal Notification was published in the Gazette of India vide notification No.14/2002-Central Excise (N.T.) dated the 8 th March, 2002 [G.S.R. 182 (E) dated the 8 th March, 2002] and was last amended vide notification No.22/2002-Central Excise (N.T.) dated the 5 th June, 2002 [G.S.R. 403 (E) dated the 5 th June, 2002]. -- 1 of 1 --
